title: Mathu Vadalara 2
desc: Delivery boys Babu and Yesu join a special police team in a bid to fill their pockets. However, they find themselves in trouble when they set out to solve a kidnapping case.

title: Vikramarkudu
desc: When Sathi Babu, a thief, finds a little girl who claims him as her father, his life changes.

title: Extra Ordinary Man
desc: Abhinay, a struggling artist, meets the woman of his dreams and changes his aim. However, stumbling upon the chance to star in a movie, Abhinay's life takes a drastic turn.

title: Bheema
desc: Sekar admires Chinna and teams up with him to take over the streets of Chennai. However, things change drastically when Sekar falls in love and decides to change his ways.

title: Om Bheem Bush
desc: Three scientists arrive at a village in search of a treasure. However, things take a turn when they explore a haunted palace and discover black magic.

title: Adhurs
desc: Twin brothers, separated at birth, grow up in vastly different environments. However, they are reunited when one gets kidnapped by gangsters.

title: Saamy 2
desc: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Okkade
desc: A minister assigns Yugandhar, an honest police officer, to find a way to stop gang leader Subbarayudu and his followers who are running a parallel government.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Masthi Maja
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the funniest comedy scenes from popular Telugu movies is played back to back.

title: Parking
desc: A parking spot frays the relationship between two neighbours of different generations and world views. Soon, the two men find themselves in an escalating battle to have the space all to themselves.

title: Kevvu Keka
desc: Lakshmi's father does not approve of her relationship with her boyfriend, Buchi, as he is not rich. She then challenges him that Buchi will become a millionaire in six months.

title: SALAAR PART 1
desc: The future of a fiercely disputed nation hinges on the strained dynamics between Deva and Vardha Raja, two allies-turned-enemies.

title: Hidimbha
desc: In Hyderabad, a series of murders targets young girls. Later, officers Aadhya and Abhay investigate as more victims disappear, soon discovering a common link among them.

title: Sarkaru Vaari Paata
desc: Mahi tries to retrieve a large amount of money she loaned to her deceitful partner. However, she uncovers a giant banking scandal on her visit.

title: Sita
desc: Ram, a young boy, lives in a monastery waiting for Sita to return and take care of him. However, Sita returns, years later, but with an ulterior motive.
